purpose: Rank candidate playbooks for a normalized alert using transparent, auditable criteria rather than opaque AI.
formula: score = 100 * sum(weight_i * component_i) - 100 * sum(penalty_j); clamp to [0,100]

componentDefinitions.alertTypeMatch: 1 when normalizedAlert.alertType is in playbook.alertTypes; 0.35 for related category; 0 otherwise.
componentDefinitions.mitreTechniqueMatch: 1 when at least one alert MITRE technique exactly matches the playbook; 0.7 for same tactic; 0 when unavailable; neutral 0.5 may be used only when alert lacks MITRE mapping.
componentDefinitions.severityMatch: 1 exact/in-range match; 0.7 if adjacent severity; 0.3 otherwise.
componentDefinitions.assetCriticalityMatch: 1 if alert asset criticality is in affinity list; 0.7 if adjacent; 0.4 if missing; 0.2 if mismatched.
componentDefinitions.indicatorContextMatch: Positive signal coverage minus benign/conflicting signal pressure, normalized to [0,1].
componentDefinitions.alertConfidence: normalizedAlert.confidence or 0.5 default for demo alerts.
componentDefinitions.sourceReliability: Reliability of alert source, e.g., EDR/WAF/SIEM/manual report, default 0.6.
componentDefinitions.automationSuitability: playbook.automationSuitability adjusted down when analyst approval risk is high.
componentDefinitions.historicalPerformance: 0.5 default; otherwise based on playbook success rate and analyst acceptance rate.
